memoryArtifacts.headline: The Desmonds: Irish Forerunners of the Adairs
memoryArtifacts.description:
By Mike Winder

          As the sun set on the thirteenth century, Thomas FitzMaurice Fitzgerald of Desmond, soon to be named Lord of Decies, produced a son.  Named for his father, Thomas FitzThomas …

memoryArtifacts.headline: Thomas Fitzmaurice FitzGerald, 2nd Baron of Desmond (d. 1298)
memoryArtifacts.description:
Thomas Fitzmaurice FitzGerald, 2nd Baron of Desmond (d. 1298), was the son of Maurice FitzJohn FitzGerald and grandson of John FitzThomas FitzGerald from whom he inherited the title.

Thomas succeeded …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Fitzmaurice FitzGerald 2nd Baron Desmond於1261年4月出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 沃特福德沃特福德時，他的父親Maurice Fitz John Lord of Decies and Desmond21歲，母親Maud de Barry20歲。他於1293年之前與Margaret De Berkeley在愛爾蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1298年6月4日在愛爾蘭庫迪 利默里克可諾凱尼享年37歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 科克尤加爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Fitzmaurice FitzGerald 2nd Baron Desmond于1261年4月出生在爱尔兰庫迪 沃特福德沃特福德时，他的父亲Maurice Fitz John Lord of Decies and Desmond21岁，母亲Maud de Barry20岁。他于1293年之前与Margaret De Berkeley在爱尔兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1298年6月4日在爱尔兰庫迪 利默里克可諾凱尼享年37岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 科克尤加爾。

nameMeanings.name: FitzGerald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Eamon, Liam, Aidan, Bridgid, Caitlin, Donal, Fitz, Fitzgerald, Ciaran, Colum, Dermot.

Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Gerald (see Gerald ), ‘son of Gerald’. This is a very common Anglo-Norman name in Ireland, where it has been Gaelicized as Mac Gearailt. Irish bearers of the name claim descent from Gerald Fitzwalter de Windsor, constable of Pembroke Castle in the early 12th century, whose grandson Raymond (or Redmond) ‘le Gros’ FitzGerald (died after 1185) led the invasion of Ireland on behalf of Strongbow in 1170. A branch of the family held the title Knight of Glin from at least 1299–2011.

variants.name: Jarrell
meanings: English (Kent and Middlesex; of Norman origin): variant of Jarrold, itself a variant of Gerald .

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

nameMeanings.name: Fitzmaurice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Aidan, Ciaran, Colm.

Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Maurice (see Morris 1), ‘son of Maurice’. This surname is common in Ireland, where it has also been Gaelicized as Mac Muiris. The Irish family of Fitzmaurice share a common Norman ancestry with the Fitzgerald family. They can be traced to Thomas Fitzmaurice, whose brother Gerald was the ancestor of the Irish Fitzgerald dynasty. Their father was Maurice Fitzgerald, a Norman baron (died 1176).

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: Either a short form of any of the numerous names representing a transferred use of a surname formed with the Anglo-Norman French prefix fi(t)z ‘son of ’, as for example Fitzgerald , Fitzroy , or a transferred use of the surname Fitz, which may be of the same derivation, but applied originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same given name, or a local name from Fitz in Shropshire, named with the Old English personal name Fitt + hōh ‘hill spur’.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Fitzmaurice FitzGerald 2nd Baron Desmond was born in April 1261, in Waterford, County Waterford, Ireland, his father, Maurice Fitz John Lord of Decies and Desmond, was 21 and his mother, Maud de Barry, was 20. He married Margaret De Berkeley before 1293, in Ireland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 4 June 1298, in Knockainy, County Limerick, Ireland, at the age of 37, and was buried in Youghal, County Cork, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Fitzmaurice FitzGerald 2nd Baron Desmond est né en avril 1261, à Waterford, County Waterford, Irlande, son père, Maurice Fitz John Lord of Decies and Desmond, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Maud de Barry, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Margaret De Berkeley avant 1293, à Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 4 juin 1298, à Knockainy, County Limerick, Irlande, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterré à Youghal, County Cork, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Fitzmaurice FitzGerald 2nd Baron Desmond im April 1261 in Waterford, County Waterford, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Maurice Fitz John Lord of Decies and Desmond 21 und seine Mutter Maud de Barry 20. Er hat vor 1293 in Irland Margaret De Berkeley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 4. Juni 1298 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Knockainy, County Limerick, Irland und wurde in Youghal, County Cork, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Fitzmaurice FitzGerald 2nd Baron Desmond è nato il nel aprile 1261 nel Waterford, County Waterford, Irlanda, il suo padre, Maurice Fitz John Lord of Decies and Desmond, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Maud de Barry, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Margaret De Berkeley prima del 1293, nel Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 4 giugno 1298, nel Knockainy, County Limerick, Irlanda, all'età di 37 anni, e fu sepolto a Youghal, County Cork, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Fitzmaurice FitzGerald 2nd Baron Desmondが1261年4月にアイルランドコウントイ ワテルフォードワテルフォードで生まれた時，父Maurice Fitz John Lord of Decies and Desmondは21歳，母Maud de Barryは20歳であった。1293年以前にアイルランドでMargaret De Berkeleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1298年6月4日にアイルランドコウントイ リメリックノクアイニーで37歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ コルクイオウアルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Fitzmaurice FitzGerald 2nd Baron Desmond(이)가 1261년 4월 아일랜드 카운티 왓르퍼드 왓르퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Maurice Fitz John Lord of Decies and Desmond(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud de Barry(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1293년 이전 아일랜드에서 Margaret De Berkeley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1298년 6월 4일 아일랜드 카운티 라임릭 노c카인이에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 코르크 요우그할에 묻혔다.

mn.Apr 1261–4 Jun 1298: 1261 оны Дөрөвдүгээр сар–1298 оны Зургаадугаар сарын 4

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Fitzmaurice FitzGerald 2nd Baron Desmond nasceu em abril de 1261, em Waterford, County Waterford, Irlanda, seu pai, Maurice Fitz John Lord of Decies and Desmond, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Maud de Barry, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret De Berkeley antes 1293, em Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 4 de junho de 1298, em Knockainy, County Limerick, Irlanda, com 37 anos, e foi sepultado em Youghal, County Cork, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Fitzmaurice FitzGerald 2nd Baron Desmond родился апрель 1261 г. в местности вэитирфорд, коунти вэитирфорд, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Maurice Fitz John Lord of Decies and Desmond было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Maud de Barry, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret De Berkeley перед 1293 г. в местности Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 4 июня 1298 г. в местности ноккеини, коунти лимирикк, Ирландия в возрасте 37 лет и был похоронен в местности еугэл, коунти корк, Ирландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Fitzmaurice FitzGerald 2nd Baron Desmond nació en abril de 1261, en Waterford, County Waterford, Irlanda, su papá, Maurice Fitz John Lord of Decies and Desmond, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Maud de Barry, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Margaret De Berkeley antes de 1293, en Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 4 de junio de 1298, en Knockainy, County Limerick, Irlanda, a la edad de 37 años, y fue sepultado en Youghal, County Cork, Irlanda.
